form.formComment: Showed strong pace early but found one better when a 1.3 lengths second over 342m this track in 19.98. Has claims if at her best.

form.formComment: Hit the frame latest (19.82) when second at this track in a Grade 6. Yet to win but has placed four times from this draw. Expected to go close.

formComments.comment: Hit the frame latest (19.82) when second at this track in a Grade 6. Yet to win but has placed four times from this draw. Expected to go close.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Checked first turn; Checked turn off back straight.

form.formComment: Narrowly beaten last time at Gawler when only a nose from the winner but did record a solid 22.86 over the 400m trip. Should be in this for a long way.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Narrowly beaten last time at Gawler when only a nose from the winner but did record a solid 22.86 over the 400m trip. Should be in this for a long way.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Lost ground turn off back straight.

form.formComment: Good starter. Last start finished 4th on March 30 over 342m at this track behind Trophy Darts beaten 5.5 lengths (19.99) in a Grade 6. Has been around the mark at his last couple and should make his presence felt.

form.formComment: Finished third last start (19.83) over 342m at this track. Jumps from a wide draw. Must be included.

form.formComment: Good performance to win by 1.3 lengths at this track over 342m (19.70) beating Cabao Nickel in Other on March 24. Makes plenty of appeal. Go close again.

form.formComment: Has shown little speed out of the boxes and drifts back in his races. Last start finished sixth over 342m at this track, beaten 11 lengths. Looks tested in this company.
